channel.title: Ctf on zx10r blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ctf on zx10r blog

item.title: Web Exploitation Workflow
item.description: A practical workflow I use for approaching web targets in labs and CTFs, from surface mapping to exploit validation.

item.title: My First CTF
item.description: A short walkthrough of my first rooted CTF target, from initial enumeration to privilege escalation.
